data.body: RESUME POINT (config-loading / dock-unison-jar): plan in vault Tech Specs/OSCER/config-loading-extraction-plan.md is FINAL — two Fable reviews folded in (mechanics + forward-fit). Scope = plumbing-only ConfigLoading module (deferral of deep-merge base validated vs #735). Approved decisions: (1) prune each loader spec's safe_load_optional block to 2 wiring examples (public happy-path pins extend visibility; raise_error(Loader::ConfigurationError,/Invalid YAML/) pins alias); (2) keep require_relative + Zeitwerk-asymmetry comment. NEXT STEPS: (a) config-loading needs its OWN branch off main + its own GitHub issue (C1 PR #738 is separate; do NOT build on the C1 branch); (b) finish tests-first: spec/support/yaml_config_helpers.rb already written (untracked, carries across checkout), still need spec/services/config_loading_spec.rb (exercise via Module.new { extend ConfigLoading }; matrix: missing/empty/comments/{} ->{}, valid hash passthrough, !ruby/symbol + malformed -> /Invalid YAML/, non-Hash -> /Expected a Hash at top level/); present spec for approval; (c) implement: app/services/config_loading.rb (public instance methods, NOT module_function; +comment warning), extend+alias in both loaders (delete plumbing), add require_relative 'support/yaml_config_helpers' to rails_helper.rb (glob is commented out at :63), add alias-identity assertion per loader spec; (d) verify per plan; (e) retitle rebar ticket base-class->shared-module. Git: currently on C1 branch giverm/OSCER-736 (committed+pushed, PR #738), untracked yaml_config_helpers.rb present.
